author: findflowstate
description: Turn handwriting and voice memos into text - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: iamjarins
manifest.description: Automatically transcribe handwritten notes and voice memos & store them in your vault.
manifest.name: Flowstate

name: FlowState

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Fix project creation:** Resolved an error when creating new Obsidian projects caused by a stale `access_token` column reference after OAuth tokens moved to Supabase Vault
- **CI releases:** Build artifacts are now produced in GitHub Actions with verified attestations

releases.author: iamjarins
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Save button loading state:** Prevents double-clicks when saving a project — button shows "Saving..." and disables during save
- **Cleaner project list:** Removed redundant "Destination:" prefix from project descriptions
- **Auto-update paths on vault moves:** Route destination paths automatically update when you rename or move files/folders in your vault
- **BRAT installation support:** Added BRAT install instructions to README for easier plugin installation and updates
- **Refactored sync pipeline:** Priority job sync for faster deep-link opens — target file opens immediately while remaining jobs sync in the background

releases.author: iamjarins
releases.description:
[FlowState](https://findflow.ai/) is the missing bridge between offline notes and your digital brain. The plugin transcribes handwritten notes and voice memos using AI, and automatically stores the files exactly where you want in your Obsidian vault.

  Features:
  - AI-powered transcription of handwritten notes and audio
  - Enrichment options (translate, summarize, extract action items, etc.)
  - Multiple projects with custom destinations
  - Create new files or append to existing ones
  - Email to upload files
  - Download original files to vault
releases.name: Initial release of FlowState for Obsidian

releases.author: iamjarins
releases.description:
First release of the Flow State Obsidian plugin. 

Flow State is currently in beta. During that time, it is free to use. However, please note that paid pricing will be added later.
